title: 4 Piece Stainless Steel Hob Cover Protector Lid Set (Silver)
features: This is a wonderful quality set of FOUR stainless steel hob covers to give a smart, clean look to your hob when not in use and enhance the look of your kitchen
The set consists of two small covers which are 17cm in diameter and 1.1cm deep and two larger covers, which are 21cm in diameter and also 1.1cm deep
Choose the colour to match the design of your kitchen.
